Genesis Kreations

Terms and Conditions

Effective Date: 30 June 2026

1. Acceptance of Terms

Welcome to the website of Genesis Kreations Media Private Limited (“Genesis Kreations”, “we”, “our”, or “us”). By accessing or using this website, you agree to be bound by these Terms and Conditions. If you do not agree, please discontinue use of the website.

2. Services

Genesis Kreations Media Private Limited provides media production, photography, videography, digital marketing, live streaming, studio rental, media training, workshops, and related creative services. Specific services may be governed by separate agreements.

3. Website Use

You agree to use this website only for lawful purposes and in a manner that does not infringe the rights of others or interfere with the operation of the website.

4. Intellectual Property

All website content, including text, graphics, logos, images, videos, designs, trademarks, and other materials, is owned by or licensed to Genesis Kreations Media Private Limited and is protected by applicable intellectual property laws. Unauthorized reproduction, distribution, or modification is prohibited without prior written permission.

5. Course Registrations and Services

Course registrations, workshop enrollments, studio bookings, and media production services are subject to availability and any separate agreements, quotations, or invoices issued by Genesis Kreations.

6. Payments

All fees must be paid according to the agreed terms. Unless otherwise stated in writing, payments made for services or training are non-refundable except where required by applicable law or under an approved refund policy.

7. User Content

If you submit enquiries, testimonials, comments, or other content, you grant Genesis Kreations a non-exclusive right to use such content for responding to enquiries, improving services, or promotional purposes, unless otherwise agreed.

8. Third-Party Links

Our website may contain links to third-party websites. We are not responsible for the content, policies, or practices of external websites.

9. Limitation of Liability

Genesis Kreations Media Private Limited shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, consequential, or special damages arising from the use of this website or our services, except as required by applicable law.

10. Indemnity

You agree to indemnify and hold harmless Genesis Kreations Media Private Limited, its directors, employees, and representatives from claims arising from your misuse of the website or violation of these Terms.

11. Privacy

Your use of this website is also governed by our Privacy Policy.

12. Changes to Terms

We reserve the right to modify these Terms and Conditions at any time. Updated versions will be published on this website with a revised effective date.

13. Governing Law

These Terms and Conditions shall be governed by the laws of India. Any disputes shall be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts having jurisdiction over the registered office of Genesis Kreations Media Private Limited.

14. Contact Us

For any questions about these Terms and Conditions, please contact:

Genesis Kreations Media Private Limited
Email: info@genesiskreationsmedia.com
Phone: +91 78248 50999
Website: www.genesiskreationsmedia.com
Registered Office: #340/B1A3B1, Vinayaka Avenue, Okkiyam Thoraipakkam, Chennai 600097
